AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Stanford Researchers Released AgentFlow: In-the-Flow Reinforcement Learning RL for Modular, Tool-Using AI Agents
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Stanford researchers introduced AgentFlow, a new approach using in-the-flow reinforcement learning to enhance modular and tool-using AI agents. This method aims to improve the efficiency and adaptability of AI agents in various tasks.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Anthropic AI Releases Petri: An Open-Source Framework for Automated Auditing by Using AI Agents to Test the Behaviors of Target Models on Diverse Scenarios
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Anthropic AI launched Petri, an open-source framework that leverages AI agents for automated auditing of target models across diverse scenarios. This framework aims to enhance safety and reliability by thoroughly testing model behaviors.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Accelerating Qwen3-8B Agent on Intel® Core™ Ultra with Depth-Pruned Draft Models
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: This article details methods for accelerating the Qwen3-8B Agent on Intel Core Ultra processors using depth-pruned draft models. The focus is on optimizing the performance of existing AI agents on specific hardware.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Gemini Enterprise: Google aims to put an AI agent on every desk
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google is positioning Gemini Enterprise as a ubiquitous AI agent solution, aiming to integrate an AI agent into every workplace desk. This initiative signifies a major push for AI agent adoption in professional settings.

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new Agent Builder, allowing users to easily create AI agents capable of automating a wide range of tasks. This tool, potentially named Agentkit, could disrupt existing automation platforms like n8n.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: FlowiseAI / Flowise
